description: You are a Municipal Architect tasked with converting a stripped open-plan building shell into a local police precinct in Sweet Home 3D. Create strict functional zones by building at least 4 partition walls and installing at least 3 doors. Define and label at least 4 distinct areas, including 'Reception', 'Bullpen', 'Holding Cell', and 'Interrogation'. Furnish the precinct according to these requirements: the Bullpen must contain at least 6 desks and 8 chairs; the Holding Cells must contain at least 2 beds and 2 toilets in partitioned areas; the Interrogation room must have at least 1 table and 2 chairs; and the Reception area must have at least 4 chairs and 1 desk. Generate a 3D photo rendering of the bullpen or holding cells and save it to ~/Desktop/precinct_render.png. Save the project to preserve all changes.
